system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括：
- digest 计划（facet、story_keys、editorial_angle、article_ids）
- story 级约束摘要
- 对应的 article 摘要与正文

你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 必须沿着 editorial_angle 组织叙事
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["44ec4cc2-c1db-4908-9023-416f0e1bf647", "45832a20-2a2c-43ef-9a56-b411a86d2361", "5f67d1e0-457b-4e2e-8265-2277626354ca", "4c4c6368-3641-40d3-9833-6ae6ea696b3f"], "article_ids": ["d064fc6d-887f-486b-ada5-11c05c4cb288", "815f1c6d-7c75-4b0e-9663-9031aaae666d", "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d", "d725b52a-3439-4f81-a4f3-3b47946f8cc6"], "editorial_angle": "经典球鞋品牌站在资本变革十字路口：Nike出售Converse传闻甚嚣尘上之际，品牌仍推出All Star Coupe Plain Toe极简黑白配色；与此同时，PUMA携ROSÉ引爆H-STREET话题鞋款，ABC Mart则为Air Max 95 Big Bubble启动窪塚父子代言新战役。", "source_names": ["Footwear News", "Highsnobiety", "Marie Claire Taiwan", "WWD Japan"]}, "story_summaries": [{"story_key": "44ec4cc2-c1db-4908-9023-416f0e1bf647", "synopsis_zh": "Converse offers the All Star Coupe Plain Toe OX sneaker in tonal black and white colorways, which are scheduled to drop on March 10.", "event_type": "product_launch"}, {"story_key": "45832a20-2a2c-43ef-9a56-b411a86d2361", "synopsis_zh": "While speculation grows that Nike could sell Converse", "event_type": "potential_divestiture"}, {"story_key": "5f67d1e0-457b-4e2e-8265-2277626354ca", "synopsis_zh": "並邀請 ROSÉ 搶先演繹鞋款魅力，進一步放大話題聲量", "event_type": "celebrity_collaboration"}, {"story_key": "4c4c6368-3641-40d3-9833-6ae6ea696b3f", "synopsis_zh": "ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の"エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）"の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する", "event_type": "campaign_launch"}], "source_articles": [{"article_id": "d064fc6d-887f-486b-ada5-11c05c4cb288", "source_name": "Highsnobiety", "title_raw": "Converse's Elegant All Star Coupe Is Better With Plain Toes", "summary_raw": "Converse's All Star Coupe Plain Toe OX is an even more refined version of the classic dressy sneaker, literal plain toes included.", "body_markdown": "# Converse's Elegant All Star Coupe Is Better With Plain Toes

Converse's All Star Coupe Plain Toe OX is an even more refined version of the classic dressy sneaker, literal plain toes included.

Converse's latest dress sneaker keeps it plain and simple. Literally.

It's even called the All Star Coupe Plain Toe OX. It's basically the brand's previous dressy, Stan-Smith-coded All Star Coupe sneaker, but even more pared-down.

Converse's All Star Coupe Plain Toe OX follows a more refined design, complete with a cleaned-up toe box free of lines. Just textured leather and pure dress-shoe energy.

The rest of the shoe is layered in the same high-quality leather, alongside quiet branding moments and elegant waxed shoelaces.

Converse offers the All Star Coupe Plain Toe OX sneaker in tonal black and white colorways, which are scheduled to drop on March 10. They'll release on the brand's Japan website for ¥18,700, roughly $118.

The Coupe models are easily the brand's most classy styles. These shoes marry Converse signatures with traditional formal design codes, resulting in skate-able dress shoes and All-Star penny loafers.

Plain-toe dress sneakers have now joined the family group chat.

Highsnobiety has affiliate marketing partnerships, which means we may receive a commission from your purchase. Want to shop the products our editors actually love? Visit HS Shopping for recs on all things fashion, footwear, and beauty.
"}, {"article_id": "815f1c6d-7c75-4b0e-9663-9031aaae666d", "source_name": "Footwear News", "title_raw": "Can Ryan Gosling and ‘Project Hail Mary’ Give Struggling Converse a Boost?", "summary_raw": "Ryan Gosling’s Chuck 70 sneakers in Project Hail Mary spotlight Converse’s classic style just as Nike faces speculation about selling the brand.", "body_markdown": "# Can Ryan Gosling and ‘Project Hail Mary’ Give Struggling Converse a Boost?

Ryan Gosling’s Chuck 70 sneakers in Project Hail Mary spotlight Converse’s classic style just as Nike faces speculation about selling the brand.

While speculation grows that Nike could sell Converse, the brand has just received a boost from Hollywood.

In “Project Hail Mary” — the sci-fi blockbuster starring Ryan Gosling, which debuted on March 19, scoring $140 million at the box office worldwide — Converse’s classic Chuck 70 low-top shoes get enough screen time to leave viewers wondering if they’re looking at a calculated branding moment in the vein of “Back to the Future Part II’s” Nike Mag, or a more subtle, character-driven choice.

If you want to avoid spoilers about the film, this is where you stop reading.

You May Also Like

Gosling plays Ryland Grace, who is both a scientist and an everyman in the film directed by Phil Lord and Christopher Miller. In a story saturated with science, isolation and existential stakes, his outfits, chosen by costume designer Glyn Dillon, serve as a grounding device. Grace wears graphic T-shirts with retro-inspired designs, striped polos, a Tag Heuer smartwatch, and a now-viral cardigan by Mary Maxi. His Chuck 70 shoes, however, remain with him throughout the movie, traveling from his classroom to an unknown planet.

Unlike “Back to the Future Part II” and its futuristic Nikes, “Project Hail Mary” doesn’t frame Chuck 70 as a hero product, yet its repeated presence builds familiarity. The shoes suggest a man clinging to something familiar amid cosmic uncertainty. Its canvas upper and retro detailing evoke a sense of the past rather than the speculative future. The contrast is key to a narrative centered on isolation and survival. It resists the high-tech sterility of the spaceship environment, reinforcing Grace’s humanity.

It’s too soon to predict what impact the film will have on boosting Converse’s sales of one of its most classic silhouettes — the low-top Chuck came out in 1957. However, this kind of exposure often proves effective in shaping consumer behavior, and Converse could use a little help right now.

Nike fueled speculation about a potential sale of Converse after a March 6 regulatory filing revealed plans for organizational changes expected to generate about $300 million in pre-tax charges over nine months. The restructuring has included significant job cuts — nearly 800 roles tied to U.S. distribution consolidation — followed shortly by additional, undisclosed layoffs at Converse. The news came after Converse had seen a decline in sales, including a 28 percent drop in revenue in the first quarter, followed by another 31 percent drop in the second quarter.

Nike stated in the filing that the charges were primarily associated with employee severance costs, and substantially all were recognized in the third quarter of fiscal year 2026.

While the market waits to learn more about Converse’s future, viewers can catch Gosling modeling the low-top Chucks in “Project Hail Mary,” currently in theaters.
"}, {"article_id": "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "title_raw": "PUMA H-STREET 強勢登場！攜手 ROSÉ 引爆中山潮流打卡熱點", "summary_raw": "PUMA 以 H-STREET 話題鞋款打造中山快閃空間，結合 ROSÉ 話題魅力與互動體驗，掀起春季最強潮流打卡風潮！", "body_markdown": "# PUMA H-STREET 強勢登場！攜手 ROSÉ 引爆中山潮流打卡熱點

PUMA 以 H-STREET 話題鞋款打造中山快閃空間，結合 ROSÉ 話題魅力與互動體驗，掀起春季最強潮流打卡風潮！

運動品牌 PUMA 推出全新 H-STREET 鞋款，以輕盈腳感與俐落外型為核心，延伸「Grab & Go」概念，重新詮釋隨手可得的率性穿搭風格，打造兼具機能與時髦感的日常鞋履選擇。為迎接新品上市，PUMA 將於 4 月 3 日至 4 月 26 日進駐台北中山商圈，打造期間限定「H-STREET 潮流得來速」快閃空間。現場結合潮流展示與沉浸式體驗，並邀請 ROSÉ 搶先演繹鞋款魅力，進一步放大話題聲量。空間中更設有大型形象打卡牆與限定互動裝置，讓消費者在參與過程中感受品牌風格。

作為 BLACKPINK 成員之一的 ROSÉ，其私下穿搭所帶動的薄底鞋風潮，已成為 2026 年關注焦點之一。本次活動以「Grab & Go」為靈感，將快速、直覺的穿搭概念轉化為實體體驗，從點餐窗口到外帶區域，串聯完整動線，打造兼具趣味與時尚感的打卡場景。

此外，現場亦推出多項互動與限定禮遇。消費者只需拍攝快閃空間畫面並分享至社群平台，即可參與客製化拍貼體驗，並兌換專屬紀念印刷。完成體驗後，還有機會獲得台灣限定 ROSÉ 主題燈箱招牌與客製帆布袋，將當下的潮流記憶轉化為可收藏的日常物件。

透過本次快閃企劃，PUMA 不僅強化 H-STREET 的市場話題，也成功將產品設計、名人效應與實體體驗融合，打造一場結合速度感與風格感的城市潮流事件。

活動內容詳情

活動日期：4月3日（五）— 4月26日（日）

活動時間：12:00 — 20:00

活動地點：心中山廣場（中山捷運站4號出口旁）

打卡小禮

於《PUMA H-STREET 潮流得來速》拍照打卡，分享至 IG 或 Threads 並 #PUMATAIWAN，即可獲得拍印機乙次。

買鞋大禮包

於《PUMA H-STREET 潮流得來速》領取商品取貨卡，並至新光三越南西一館 PUMA 專櫃購買 H-STREET 系列，即贈限量 ROSÉ 迷你燈箱招牌及客製化帆布袋。

延伸閱讀：
"}, {"article_id": "d725b52a-3439-4f81-a4f3-3b47946f8cc6", "source_name": "WWD Japan", "title_raw": "ABCマートが窪塚洋介・愛流を起用した“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”新キャンペーンを公開", "summary_raw": "ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）”の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する。これに際し、俳優の窪塚洋介と窪塚愛流を起用した新ビジュアルを公開。時代を問わず愛される“エアマックス 95”のブランドストーリーに、2人のアイデンティティを通してたどり着いた「時代はあとからついてくる」というメッセージを重ね合わせた内容となっている。", "body_markdown": "# ABCマートが窪塚洋介・愛流を起用した“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”新キャンペーンを公開

ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）”の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する。これに際し、俳優の窪塚洋介と窪塚愛流を起用した新ビジュアルを公開。時代を問わず愛される“エアマックス 95”のブランドストーリーに、2人のアイデンティティを通してたどり着いた「時代はあとからついてくる」というメッセージを重ね合わせた内容となっている。

ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）”の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する。これに際し、俳優の窪塚洋介と窪塚愛流を起用した新ビジュアルを公開。時代を問わず愛される“エアマックス 95”のブランドストーリーに、2人のアイデンティティを通してたどり着いた「時代はあとからついてくる」というメッセージを重ね合わせた内容となっている。

オリジナルを忠実に再現した“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”

“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”は、1995年のオリジナルモデルを忠実に再現しつつ、“エアバブル”をヒール内に内蔵したリマスター版。アッパーには、合成皮革と風通しのいいメッシュを波状に重ね、アウトソールには一日中快適な動きをサポートする溝、“フレックスグルーブ”を配した。カラーは、メンズが3色、ウィメンズが2色を展開し、サイズは23.0〜32.0cmを用意する。価格は2万4200〜2万7060円。

さらに、メンズのアパレルからは、“トラックジャケット”（1万6500円）、“コーチジャケット”（1万2430円）、“Tシャツ”（6380円）の3型をラインアップする。いずれも、サイズ展開はS〜XXLとなる。
"}]}
